closure_note: Zero profile is the closed trivial critical profile.
Continuous Type-I self-similar blowup profiles are treated as a known closed obstruction class, not as full-profile exhaustion.
Axisymmetric no-swirl data sit in a closed symmetric regularity class.
Gamma-bounded symmetric axisymmetric-with-swirl profiles are scoped symmetric closed rows.
Non-axisymmetric Type-I profiles remain open in this taxonomy.
Non-axisymmetric Type-II profiles remain open and are not exhausted by symmetric closure.
Discretely self-similar profiles remain open in the critical-profile taxonomy.
Ancient bounded non-symmetric profiles remain open and block profile-exhaustion promotion.
